mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_station_air (station_name, addr, install_year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, tm) VALUES (#{stationName}, #{addr}, #{year}, #{mangName}, #{item}, #{dmX}, #{dmY}, #{tm}) ON CONFLICT (station_name) DO UPDATE SET addr = EXCLUDED.addr, install_year = EXCLUDED.install_year, mang_name = EXCLUDED.mang_name, item = EXCLUDED.item, dm_x = EXCLUDED.dm_x, dm_y = EXCLUDED.dm_y, tm = EXCLUDED.tm, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO sub_station_air (station_name, addr, install_year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, tm) VALUES (#{stationName}, #{addr}, #{year}, #{mangName}, #{item}, #{dmX}::numeric, #{dmY}::numeric, #{tm})
mapper.update: UPDATE sub_station_air SET station_name = #{stationName}, addr = #{addr}, install_year = #{year}, mang_name = #{mangName}, item = #{item}, dm_x = #{dmX}::numeric, dm_y = #{dmY}::numeric, tm = #{tm}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE station_id = #{stationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT station_id, station_name, addr, install_year AS year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, tm, created_at, updated_at FROM sub_station_air
AND ( station_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR addr LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR mang_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY station_id
